name: Grilled Chorizo, Jicama and Orange Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the jicama and cut into matchstick julienne.
2. Set aside.
3. Cut sausage into 1/2-inch thick slices.
4. Broil on tray until cooked through. Keep warm.
5. Divide jicama among 4 plates.
6. Top each portion with 5 orange segments.
7. Sprinkle with 1 tablespoon lemon juice.
8. Top with 6-7 slices of sausage with drippings.
9. Sprinkle with paprika.
10. Garnish with parsley.
